The Village at Corte Madera

Gourmet Dogs. Serious Sausage Snap. Built Fresh in Corte Madera.

Stang's serves bold hot dogs, sausages, toppings, drinks, and quick lunch energy right at The Village at Corte Madera.

The Menu

Built Your Way. Bold Every Bite.

Gourmet dogs and sausages loaded with flavor. Pick your base, pile on toppings, and make it yours.

Signature Dogs

Classic All-Beef Hot Dog

Snappy casing, toasted bun, built your way.

Bold chili, melted cheese, all the comfort.

Interactive

Build Your Perfect Dog

Pick your base, bun, toppings, and sauce. Watch your creation come to life.

Your Dog

Why Stang's

More Than a Hot Dog.

Here is why locals keep coming back to Stang's at The Village.

Big Flavor, Quick Service

A quick bite that tastes like you planned your whole day around it. Grab lunch without the wait.

Outdoor Seating

Soak up the Corte Madera sun while you eat. Relaxed patio vibes with your dog.

Gourmet Sausage Options

From snappy all-beef dogs to bold sausage varieties — every option hits different.

Vegetarian-Friendly

Beyond sausage and veggie-friendly toppings mean everyone gets a dog they love.

Great Lunch Stop

Right at The Village — perfect for a midday break while shopping or running errands.

Local Corte Madera Favorite

A known spot in Marin County for anyone craving a serious hot dog or sausage.

Visit Us

Find Stang's at The Village

Easy to find, hard to forget. Stop by for a quick bite in Corte Madera.
